disease_info.description: Eczema (dermatitis) is a chronic inflammatory skin condition characterized by itching, dryness, redness, and episodic flare-ups caused by immune hypersensitivity or irritants.
disease_info.common_symptoms: Dryness, itching, redness, skin cracking, rough patches
disease_info.recommended_action: Moisturize regularly, avoid triggers, use topical corticosteroids if prescribed.
disease_info.image_indicators: Dry patches, redness, lichenified skin, scratch marks
